name: thinkbreak
description: A Hook-first waiting recipe for Codex: run a user-defined action while work is in progress, then return focus when it ends.

interface.shortDescription: Configure your own waiting action for Codex
interface.longDescription: ThinkBreak is a lightweight Hook dispatcher and Skill. It does not run a desktop app, browser extension, MCP server, ad SDK, or token service. Waiting behavior lives in user-editable Recipes.
defaultPrompt: Use the ThinkBreak Skill to configure a waiting Recipe for this Codex task.
